records.m_Talk_ENG: Not bad, for a mere vermin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not bad, for a mere vermin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not bad, for a mere vermin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it won't matter. With the queen's blessing, this flesh will not fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it won't matter. With the queen's blessing, this flesh will not fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it won't matter. With the queen's blessing, this flesh will not fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A reality steeped in Qlipha does seem to favor you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A reality steeped in Qlipha does seem to favor you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A reality steeped in Qlipha does seem to favor you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Arsenal Wings are a hastily made replica powered by Alternium... Comparable performance, but with a strict time limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Arsenal Wings are a hastily made replica powered by Alternium... Comparable performance, but with a strict time limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Arsenal Wings are a hastily made replica powered by Alternium... Comparable performance, but with a strict time limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can't finish this quickly, I'll be at a severe disadvantage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can't finish this quickly, I'll be at a severe disadvantage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can't finish this quickly, I'll be at a severe disadvantage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're having trouble fighting properly because you're protecting me, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're having trouble fighting properly because you're protecting me, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're having trouble fighting properly because you're protecting me, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Defeating that thing is only a secondary concern. The primary objective has already been achieved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Defeating that thing is only a secondary concern. The primary objective has already been achieved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Defeating that thing is only a secondary concern. The primary objective has already been achieved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The primary objective?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The primary objective?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The primary objective?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration issued a directive to extract Nicole Primer safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration issued a directive to extract Nicole Primer safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration issued a directive to extract Nicole Primer safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration... ordered my rescue?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration... ordered my rescue?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration... ordered my rescue?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. And the rest will be handled by the reinforcements.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. And the rest will be handled by the reinforcements.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. And the rest will be handled by the reinforcements.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sky...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sky...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sky...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's completely white.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's completely white.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's completely white.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that... an angel?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that... an angel?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that... an angel?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, policies made by humans are never worth trusting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, policies made by humans are never worth trusting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, policies made by humans are never worth trusting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They take taxes faithfully under the guise of public security, yet all they do is blare sirens?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They take taxes faithfully under the guise of public security, yet all they do is blare sirens?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They take taxes faithfully under the guise of public security, yet all they do is blare sirens?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You do realize that fully charging your reactor would require energy on a citywide scale, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You do realize that fully charging your reactor would require energy on a citywide scale, correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You do realize that fully charging your reactor would require energy on a citywide scale, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As compensation for your cooperation, the Administration has decided exceptionally not to levy taxes. We appreciate your assistance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As compensation for your cooperation, the Administration has decided exceptionally not to levy taxes. We appreciate your assistance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As compensation for your cooperation, the Administration has decided exceptionally not to levy taxes. We appreciate your assistance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arguing about money right up to the brink of the world's end... Seems the Administration has some humans with humanity left in them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arguing about money right up to the brink of the world's end... Seems the Administration has some humans with humanity left in them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arguing about money right up to the brink of the world's end... Seems the Administration has some humans with humanity left in them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once this is over, I'll speak to you face-to-face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once this is over, I'll speak to you face-to-face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once this is over, I'll speak to you face-to-face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those wings... are you an Apostle sent by Asimov?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those wings... are you an Apostle sent by Asimov?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those wings... are you an Apostle sent by Asimov?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not an Apostle. A model taxpayer, you invasive species.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not an Apostle. A model taxpayer, you invasive species.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not an Apostle. A model taxpayer, you invasive species.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pitiable. It seems you forgot the role of an obedient doll because you developed a half-baked ego.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pitiable. It seems you forgot the role of an obedient doll because you developed a half-baked ego.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pitiable. It seems you forgot the role of an obedient doll because you developed a half-baked ego.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do consider myself unfortunate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do consider myself unfortunate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do consider myself unfortunate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But compared to you, who fell from human to a mindless puppet, my situation is far better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But compared to you, who fell from human to a mindless puppet, my situation is far better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But compared to you, who fell from human to a mindless puppet, my situation is far better.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You speak as if you know me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You speak as if you know me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You speak as if you know me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is our first meeting. Seems that physiognomy primer I took from a delinquent wasn't complete nonsense after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is our first meeting. Seems that physiognomy primer I took from a delinquent wasn't complete nonsense after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is our first meeting. Seems that physiognomy primer I took from a delinquent wasn't complete nonsense after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is Thagirion hiding after causing all this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is Thagirion hiding after causing all this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is Thagirion hiding after causing all this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The queen has come to reclaim what was lost.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The queen has come to reclaim what was lost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The queen has come to reclaim what was lost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Granting you your end is merely a trivial matter by comparison.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Granting you your end is merely a trivial matter by comparison.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Granting you your end is merely a trivial matter by comparison.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take that to mean that defeating you will let me see her face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take that to mean that defeating you will let me see her face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take that to mean that defeating you will let me see her face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think you can?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think you can?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think you can?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ten seconds will be enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ten seconds will be enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ten seconds will be enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An angel... is fighting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An angel... is fighting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An angel... is fighting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Against such a powerful Apostle, without yielding even an inch...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Against such a powerful Apostle, without yielding even an inch...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Against such a powerful Apostle, without yielding even an inch...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole Primer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole Primer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole Primer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will be blinding. Please close your eyes for a moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will be blinding. Please close your eyes for a moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will be blinding. Please close your eyes for a moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said ten seconds would be enough. Looks like your calculations were off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said ten seconds would be enough. Looks like your calculations were off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said ten seconds would be enough. Looks like your calculations were off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who said I'd finish in ten seconds?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who said I'd finish in ten seconds?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who said I'd finish in ten seconds?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ten seconds elapsed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ten seconds elapsed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ten seconds elapsed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Avesta Drive, charging complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Avesta Drive, charging complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Avesta Drive, charging complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Alternium limiter released. Strike Code: LSY, temporarily authorized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Alternium limiter released. Strike Code: LSY, temporarily authorized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Alternium limiter released. Strike Code: LSY, temporarily authorized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Executing wide-area annihilation program.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Executing wide-area annihilation program.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Executing wide-area annihilation program.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reactive Sword, maximum output!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reactive Sword, maximum output!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reactive Sword, maximum output!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grr... You deceived me well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grr... You deceived me well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grr... You deceived me well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this alone is not enough...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this alone is not enough...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this alone is not enough...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: True. This wouldn't be sufficient to expel you from reality, having reached beyond a Category 5.
records.m_Talk_DEU: True. This wouldn't be sufficient to expel you from reality, having reached beyond a Category 5.
records.m_Talk_FRA: True. This wouldn't be sufficient to expel you from reality, having reached beyond a Category 5.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for a while, you won't be using that damned spatial displacement ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for a while, you won't be using that damned spatial displacement ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for a while, you won't be using that damned spatial displacement ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shiyoon...! Now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shiyoon...! Now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shiyoon...! Now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wolf?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wolf?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wolf?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wolvesbane... Limiter unlocked to max output.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wolvesbane... Limiter unlocked to max output.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wolvesbane... Limiter unlocked to max output.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaaagh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaaagh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaaagh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just now... she really jumped out of thin air, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just now... she really jumped out of thin air, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just now... she really jumped out of thin air, didn't she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I cut through space, Mina crosses through the opening and strikes the enemy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I cut through space, Mina crosses through the opening and strikes the enemy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I cut through space, Mina crosses through the opening and strikes the enemy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, pulling off an unpracticed combo on the first try. We've got great synergy, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, pulling off an unpracticed combo on the first try. We've got great synergy, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, pulling off an unpracticed combo on the first try. We've got great synergy, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That may be true... but my stomach feels awful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That may be true... but my stomach feels awful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That may be true... but my stomach feels awful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... the ramen I ate earlier...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... the ramen I ate earlier...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... the ramen I ate earlier...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, maybe you'll get used to it after a few more times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, maybe you'll get used to it after a few more times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, maybe you'll get used to it after a few more times.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of doing that again! ...Unless it's an absolute emergency.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of doing that again! ...Unless it's an absolute emergency.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of doing that again! ...Unless it's an absolute emergency.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's already too late...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's already too late...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's already too late...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that we have arrived... your world will soon be swallowed by eternal winter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that we have arrived... your world will soon be swallowed by eternal winter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that we have arrived... your world will soon be swallowed by eternal winter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Grand Dimension Crevice is splitting again. Is there still something left to come out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Grand Dimension Crevice is splitting again. Is there still something left to come out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Grand Dimension Crevice is splitting again. Is there still something left to come out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If what Irene said is correct, then it's time for <color=#ffd34c>that</color> to appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If what Irene said is correct, then it's time for <color=#ffd34c>that</color> to appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If what Irene said is correct, then it's time for <color=#ffd34c>that</color> to appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Irene?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Irene?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Irene?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why... do you know that name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why... do you know that name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why... do you know that name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're wondering why we call Thagirion's Apostle as if she were on our side, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're wondering why we call Thagirion's Apostle as if she were on our side, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're wondering why we call Thagirion's Apostle as if she were on our side, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, our boss is the kind of person who'd welcome even a sworn enemy as an employee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, our boss is the kind of person who'd welcome even a sworn enemy as an employee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, our boss is the kind of person who'd welcome even a sworn enemy as an employee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My deepest apologies, my queen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My deepest apologies, my queen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My deepest apologies, my queen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please... fulfill the will of you both.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please... fulfill the will of you both.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please... fulfill the will of you both.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Confirmed. The Apostle entity has been neutralized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Confirmed. The Apostle entity has been neutralized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Confirmed. The Apostle entity has been neutralized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the Apostle's destruction, the Qlipha energy from the Grand Dimension Crevice is rapidly spreading!
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the Apostle's destruction, the Qlipha energy from the Grand Dimension Crevice is rapidly spreading!
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the Apostle's destruction, the Qlipha energy from the Grand Dimension Crevice is rapidly spreading!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, Ground One will be Corrupted within a minute!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, Ground One will be Corrupted within a minute!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, Ground One will be Corrupted within a minute!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle, can you stop it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, can you stop it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, can you stop it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Mina!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Mina!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Mina!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never done anything like this before, but <color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>, I feel like I can pull it off!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never done anything like this before, but <color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>, I feel like I can pull it off!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never done anything like this before, but <color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>, I feel like I can pull it off!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. If you're going to reassure us, could you maybe not use words like "<color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. If you're going to reassure us, could you maybe not use words like "<color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. If you're going to reassure us, could you maybe not use words like "<color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then Super Noelle! To <color=#ffd34c>definitely</color> stop whatever terrifying thing is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice! Moving out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then Super Noelle! To <color=#ffd34c>definitely</color> stop whatever terrifying thing is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice! Moving out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then Super Noelle! To <color=#ffd34c>definitely</color> stop whatever terrifying thing is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice! Moving out!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Granting you your end is merely a trivial matter by comparison.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take that to mean that defeating you will let me see her face.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take that to mean that defeating you will let me see her face.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take that to mean that defeating you will let me see her face.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think you can?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think you can?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think you can?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ten seconds will be enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ten seconds will be enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ten seconds will be enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An angel... is fighting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An angel... is fighting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An angel... is fighting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Against such a powerful Apostle, without yielding even an inch...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Against such a powerful Apostle, without yielding even an inch...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Against such a powerful Apostle, without yielding even an inch...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole Primer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole Primer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole Primer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It will be blinding. Please close your eyes for a moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It will be blinding. Please close your eyes for a moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It will be blinding. Please close your eyes for a moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said ten seconds would be enough. Looks like your calculations were off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said ten seconds would be enough. Looks like your calculations were off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said ten seconds would be enough. Looks like your calculations were off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who said I'd finish in ten seconds?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who said I'd finish in ten seconds?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who said I'd finish in ten seconds?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ten seconds elapsed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ten seconds elapsed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ten seconds elapsed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Avesta Drive, charging complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Avesta Drive, charging complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Avesta Drive, charging complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Alternium limiter released. Strike Code: LSY, temporarily authorized.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Alternium limiter released. Strike Code: LSY, temporarily authorized.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Alternium limiter released. Strike Code: LSY, temporarily authorized.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Executing wide-area annihilation program.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Executing wide-area annihilation program.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Executing wide-area annihilation program.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Reactive Sword, maximum output!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Reactive Sword, maximum output!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Reactive Sword, maximum output!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grr... You deceived me well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grr... You deceived me well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grr... You deceived me well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But this alone is not enough...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But this alone is not enough...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But this alone is not enough...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: True. This wouldn't be sufficient to expel you from reality, having reached beyond a Category 5.
root.m_Talk_DEU: True. This wouldn't be sufficient to expel you from reality, having reached beyond a Category 5.
root.m_Talk_FRA: True. This wouldn't be sufficient to expel you from reality, having reached beyond a Category 5.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for a while, you won't be using that damned spatial displacement ability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for a while, you won't be using that damned spatial displacement ability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for a while, you won't be using that damned spatial displacement ability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shiyoon...! Now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shiyoon...! Now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shiyoon...! Now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wolf?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wolf?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wolf?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wolvesbane... Limiter unlocked to max output.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wolvesbane... Limiter unlocked to max output.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wolvesbane... Limiter unlocked to max output.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaaagh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaaagh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaaagh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just now... she really jumped out of thin air, didn't she?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just now... she really jumped out of thin air, didn't she?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just now... she really jumped out of thin air, didn't she?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I cut through space, Mina crosses through the opening and strikes the enemy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I cut through space, Mina crosses through the opening and strikes the enemy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I cut through space, Mina crosses through the opening and strikes the enemy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, pulling off an unpracticed combo on the first try. We've got great synergy, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, pulling off an unpracticed combo on the first try. We've got great synergy, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, pulling off an unpracticed combo on the first try. We've got great synergy, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That may be true... but my stomach feels awful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That may be true... but my stomach feels awful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That may be true... but my stomach feels awful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... the ramen I ate earlier...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... the ramen I ate earlier...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... the ramen I ate earlier...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, maybe you'll get used to it after a few more times.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, maybe you'll get used to it after a few more times.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, maybe you'll get used to it after a few more times.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of doing that again! ...Unless it's an absolute emergency.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of doing that again! ...Unless it's an absolute emergency.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of doing that again! ...Unless it's an absolute emergency.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's already too late...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's already too late...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's already too late...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that we have arrived... your world will soon be swallowed by eternal winter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that we have arrived... your world will soon be swallowed by eternal winter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that we have arrived... your world will soon be swallowed by eternal winter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Grand Dimension Crevice is splitting again. Is there still something left to come out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Grand Dimension Crevice is splitting again. Is there still something left to come out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Grand Dimension Crevice is splitting again. Is there still something left to come out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If what Irene said is correct, then it's time for <color=#ffd34c>that</color> to appear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If what Irene said is correct, then it's time for <color=#ffd34c>that</color> to appear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If what Irene said is correct, then it's time for <color=#ffd34c>that</color> to appear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Irene?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Irene?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Irene?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why... do you know that name?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why... do you know that name?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why... do you know that name?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're wondering why we call Thagirion's Apostle as if she were on our side, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're wondering why we call Thagirion's Apostle as if she were on our side, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're wondering why we call Thagirion's Apostle as if she were on our side, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, our boss is the kind of person who'd welcome even a sworn enemy as an employee.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, our boss is the kind of person who'd welcome even a sworn enemy as an employee.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, our boss is the kind of person who'd welcome even a sworn enemy as an employee.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My deepest apologies, my queen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My deepest apologies, my queen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My deepest apologies, my queen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please... fulfill the will of you both.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please... fulfill the will of you both.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please... fulfill the will of you both.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Confirmed. The Apostle entity has been neutralized.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Confirmed. The Apostle entity has been neutralized.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Confirmed. The Apostle entity has been neutralized.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the Apostle's destruction, the Qlipha energy from the Grand Dimension Crevice is rapidly spreading!
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the Apostle's destruction, the Qlipha energy from the Grand Dimension Crevice is rapidly spreading!
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the Apostle's destruction, the Qlipha energy from the Grand Dimension Crevice is rapidly spreading!

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, Ground One will be Corrupted within a minute!
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, Ground One will be Corrupted within a minute!
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, Ground One will be Corrupted within a minute!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle, can you stop it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, can you stop it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, can you stop it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Mina!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Mina!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Mina!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never done anything like this before, but <color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>, I feel like I can pull it off!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never done anything like this before, but <color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>, I feel like I can pull it off!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never done anything like this before, but <color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>, I feel like I can pull it off!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. If you're going to reassure us, could you maybe not use words like "<color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>"?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. If you're going to reassure us, could you maybe not use words like "<color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>"?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. If you're going to reassure us, could you maybe not use words like "<color=#ffd34c>somehow</color>"?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then Super Noelle! To <color=#ffd34c>definitely</color> stop whatever terrifying thing is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice! Moving out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then Super Noelle! To <color=#ffd34c>definitely</color> stop whatever terrifying thing is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice! Moving out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then Super Noelle! To <color=#ffd34c>definitely</color> stop whatever terrifying thing is coming out of the Grand Dimension Crevice! Moving out!
